message:
test: update e2e tests for mode detection changes and add resolve_module_path arity fixes

e2e_auto_repair.rs:
- Adjust test expectations for updated mode detection logic
- Simplify assertion formatting

e2e_cli.rs:
- Add test coverage for --export mode not being treated as interactive
- Update resolve_module_path call to include canonical_roots parameter

e2e_golden_corpus.rs, e2e_high_risk_workflows.rs, e2e_session_persistence.rs:
- Add canonical_roots parameter to resolve_module_path() calls in
  module resolution test paths to match updated function signature

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
